title: MISSION BRIEFING
speaker: handler
lines: Cipher... listen to me. What I'm about to say isn't protocol. This is me talking.
You've breached two layers of defense that no jockey has ever survived. The network's outer perimeter. The mid-level operational core. Both gone.
What's ahead is the deep core. The red zone. This is where the Core Intelligence lives — the source of everything. The mind that took our world.
There is no extraction protocol for core depth. If your shields drop in there... I might not be able to bring you back. Your signal will be too deep for recovery.

The environment itself is hostile. Fractal geometry. Glitching architecture. The AI's consciousness bleeds into everything at this depth. Enemies are erratic — unpredictable. They're not following patrol patterns anymore. They're adapting to YOU.
The Core Intelligence is nothing like the Gatekeeper or the Avenger. It's the source. It thinks. It reasons. And when it starts to lose... it breaks.
Your weapons are still hot. Everything you've learned — use it. Logic Bombs on the heavy targets. EMP when they swarm. And when you reach the Core... the Virus Payload finishes this.
Wraith never made it this far. Nobody has. But you're not nobody, Cipher.
I'll be on comms the whole way. No matter what happens. I'm not losing another one.
Initiating deep core insertion. This ends now.
